chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cont. Petition No.S-1110 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Directions For orders as to maintainability of petition. 04.03.2025 Barrister Jawaid Ali Dars, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Sultan Ahmed, Advocate for the respondent..-.-.-.-.-. This petition was filed by the petitioner impugning the interim order dated 15.08.2024, which was passed under Section 17-A by the learned trial Court. Thereafter, during the pendency of the instant petition, it has transpired that on 27.09.2024, the learned trial Court has pronounced the final judgment and decree and the earlier order has merged into the judgment and decree dated 27.09.2024. Learned counsel for the petitioner to seek remedy against the judgement and decree in accordance with law. At this stage stated that he may be barred in filing the appeal, however, learned counsel shall prefer an application under Section 5 of the Limitation Act, which shall be decided on its own merits by the Appellate Court. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Nadeem
